summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Year filters for PAC, PAC Geral, and Processos modules, plus full DOEM (Diário Oficial Eletrônico Municipal) module with admin and public portal. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed all features working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Created test DOEM edition via API test (TEST_DECRETO Nº 001/2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Year filters on PAC Individual (/pacs), PAC Geral (/pacs-geral), and Gestão Processual (/gestao-processual) - all show year selector dropdown with current year selected by default. 2) DOEM admin module (/doem) - create editions, add publications, publish with simulated digital signature, download PDF. 3) DOEM public portal (/doem-publico) - view published editions by year, search publications, download PDFs. 4) DOEM link visible in Portal de Transparência navigation. Digital signature is SIMULATED (generates SHA-256 hash, not real ICP-Brasil certificate).

portal_integration.doem_link_in_nav: PRESENT in Portal de Transparência navigation

mocked_apis.digital_signature: Assinatura digital ICP-Brasil é SIMULADA - apenas gera hash SHA-256 do documento, não usa certificado real
